name: Hamilton
governance_summary: Hamilton voters elect a mayor and 15 city councillors who together form the 16-member city council. The mayor is elected city-wide; each councillor represents one of 15 wards. Elections are held every four years under Ontario's Municipal Elections Act, most recently on October 24, 2022, with the next election scheduled for October 26, 2026.

name: Brampton
governance_summary: Brampton voters elect a Mayor and councillors across 10 wards that form the city's elected council. The 10 wards are grouped into 5 pairs; each ward pair elects one City Councillor and one Regional Councillor (who sits on Peel Regional Council), for a total of 10 councillors. The Mayor is elected city-wide.

name: Toronto
governance_summary: Toronto voters elect a Mayor city-wide and one Councillor per ward across 25 wards, together forming the 26-member Toronto City Council. The council structure is established under the City of Toronto Act, 2006, which provides Toronto with a strong-mayor framework alongside the ward-elected council. Municipal elections are held every four years on the fourth Monday in October under the Municipal Elections Act, 1996.

name: Ottawa
governance_summary: Ottawa voters elect a Mayor city-wide and 24 ward councillors, one per ward, who together form the 25-member Ottawa City Council. Council operates on a non-partisan basis under Ontario's Municipal Elections Act, with elections held every four years on the last Monday of October.

name: Mississauga
governance_summary: Mississauga voters elect a mayor and 11 city councillors who together form the 12-member City Council. The mayor is elected city-wide; each councillor represents one of 11 wards. Elections are held every four years under Ontario's Municipal Elections Act.

name: Barrie
governance_summary: Barrie voters elect a Mayor city-wide and one Councillor per ward across 10 wards, together forming the 11-member Barrie City Council. Council operates on a non-partisan basis under Ontario's Municipal Elections Act, with elections held every four years on the fourth Monday in October, most recently on October 24, 2022, with the next election scheduled for October 26, 2026.
